body.title: FACTUAL compression — concept clustering into INTERPRETIVE nodes
body.result: factual_compression.py created (cluster→synthesize→novelty→store INTERPRETIVE + provenance) + wired into main.py background loop; syntax clean
body.description: 10709 FACTUAL nodes (book facts) have never been retrieved (activation_count=0). Need a periodic pass that clusters thin FACTUALs on the same concept and collapses them into richer INTERPRETIVE nodes. Distinct from EPISODIC distillation (already live). Key constraints per Igor: (1) preserve book-fact provenance — source attribution must survive on output INTERPRETIVE; (2) cluster by concept not by time; (3) separate module from distillation.py to avoid grab-bag. Priority metric: retrieval quality. Ref: T-distillation-habit phase 2.
